findings.issue: Required Skills link text is '[SKILL.md]' — bare filename without path. The template pattern used in Tasks 6 and 7 is '[skills/{name}/SKILL.md](path)', which is descriptive and consistent. Task 8 reads: '`/skill:test-master` — [SKILL.md](~/.claude/skills/test-master/SKILL.md)'. The link destination is correct but the display text lacks the path prefix.

Required Skills link text is '[SKILL.md]' — same bare-filename issue as Task 8. Reads: '`/skill:pre-deploy-qa` — [SKILL.md](~/.claude/skills/pre-deploy-qa/SKILL.md)'. Inconsistent with Tasks 6 and 7 which use the full path as display text.
